# Module 00: Snowflake Tri-Cert Exam Profile

Side-by-side reference for the three Snowflake certifications in the tri-cert path. Schedule the right exam first; mismatched expectations are the most common wasted study hours.

## Learning goals
- Name the exam code, duration, question count, and passing score for each of SOL-C01, COF-C02, DEA-C02 without notes.
- State the prerequisite chain (Core -> Advanced) and who should take each exam.
- Locate the official exam page, study guide PDF, and registration path for each cert.
- Explain the mandatory 14-day retake wait and the 2-year expiry rule.

## The three exams at a glance

| Attribute | SOL-C01 (Platform) | COF-C02 (Core) | DEA-C02 (Advanced: Data Engineer) |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Full name** | SnowPro Associate: Platform | SnowPro Core | SnowPro Advanced: Data Engineer |
| **Level** | Associate | Core | Advanced |
| **Code** | SOL-C01 | COF-C02 | DEA-C02 |
| **Study guide last updated** | June 9, 2025 | August 22, 2025 | March 6, 2026 |
| **Questions** | 65 | 100 (community-reported; not printed in PDF) | Not published |
| **Duration** | 85 min | 115 min | 115 min |
| **Passing score** | 750 / 1000 (scaled) | 750 / 1000 | 750 / 1000 |
| **Question formats** | Multiple Choice, Multiple Select, Interactive | Multiple Choice, Multiple Select | Multiple Choice, Multiple Select, scenario-based |
| **Languages** | English | English | English |
| **Target audience** | 3+ months Snowflake experience | 6+ months Snowflake + basic ANSI SQL | 2+ years data engineering experience with Snowflake |
| **Prerequisite** | None | None | **Active SnowPro Core** |
| **Exam fee (USD, first attempt)** | $175 | $175 | $375 |
| **Delivery** | Pearson VUE test center or OnVUE online proctored | Pearson VUE or OnVUE | Pearson VUE or OnVUE |

Primary sources:
- *SnowPro Associate: Platform Study Guide*, p. 4 — code SOL-C01, 65 questions, 85 min, 750+, MCQ/Multi-select/Interactive.
- *SnowPro Associate: Platform Study Guide*, p. 4 — target audience "3+ months of knowledge using Snowflake".
- *SnowPro Core Study Guide*, p. 4 — target audience "at least 6 months of knowledge using the Snowflake platform".
- *SnowPro Advanced: Data Engineer Study Guide*, p. 3 — "2+ years of data engineering experience" and Core prerequisite.
- *SnowPro Advanced: Data Engineer Study Guide*, p. 4 — Core credential prerequisite ("Eligible individuals must hold an active SnowPro Core credential").
- Duration/Q-count/fee for COF-C02 and DEA-C02: based on community reports and the [Snowflake certification guide](https://www.snowflake.com/certifications/). The COF-C02 PDF does not print these numbers; confirm on [snowflake.com/en/learn/certifications/snowpro-core](https://www.snowflake.com/en/learn/certifications/snowpro-core/) before scheduling.

## Domain weights

### SOL-C01 (Platform)
*Source: SnowPro Associate: Platform Study Guide, p. 4.*

| Domain | Weight |
|---|---|
| 1.0 Interacting with Snowflake and the Architecture | 35% |
| 2.0 Identity and Data Access Management | 15% |
| 3.0 Data Loading and Virtual Warehouses | 40% |
| 4.0 Data Protection and Data Sharing | 10% |

### COF-C02 (Core)
*Source: SnowPro Core Study Guide, p. 5.*

| Domain | Weight |
|---|---|
| 1.0 Snowflake AI Data Cloud Features and Architecture | 24% |
| 2.0 Account Access and Security | 18% |
| 3.0 Performance and Cost Optimization Concepts | 16% |
| 4.0 Data Loading and Unloading | 12% |
| 5.0 Data Transformations | 18% |
| 6.0 Data Protection and Data Sharing | 12% |

### DEA-C02 (Advanced: Data Engineer)
*Source: SnowPro Advanced: Data Engineer Study Guide, p. 4.*

| Domain | Weight |
|---|---|
| 1.0 Data Movement | 28% |
| 2.0 Performance Optimization | 19% |
| 3.0 Storage and Data Protection | 14% |
| 4.0 Data Governance | 14% |
| 5.0 Data Transformation | 25% |

## Delivery, scheduling, retakes

- **Delivery channels:** All three exams are delivered via Pearson VUE — either in-person at a test center or via OnVUE online proctoring. Register through the Snowflake certification portal, which hands off to Pearson VUE.
- **Retake policy:** 14-day mandatory wait between attempts. Full exam fee each attempt. See the [Snowflake certification guide](https://www.snowflake.com/certifications/) for current retake policies.
- **Validity:** Snowflake certifications expire 2 years after the pass date. If you let Core lapse before sitting DEA, you lose DEA eligibility. See the [Snowflake certification guide](https://www.snowflake.com/certifications/) for current validity rules.
- **No NDA violation:** Snowflake exams are under NDA. Do not publish questions after sitting.

## What changed between recent versions

- **Platform SOL-C01** replaced the older "Associate: Platform" outline in mid-2025; the June 9 2025 guide is the current official version. Interactive question format was explicitly added — candidates practice in Snowsight sandbox items, not just MCQ. *Source: SnowPro Associate: Platform Study Guide, p. 1, p. 4.*
- **Core COF-C02** is the successor to COF-C01 and reflects the "AI Data Cloud" rebrand and the addition of Cortex AI/ML services, Iceberg tables, and Snowpark to the Core scope. Last updated August 22 2025. *Source: SnowPro Core Study Guide, p. 1, p. 6.*
- **DEA-C02** (March 6 2026 edition) replaced DEA-C01 and added Dynamic Tables, Snowpipe Streaming vs Kafka connector, Iceberg tables, Horizon Catalog, Cortex AI features, Git integration, and Data Clean Rooms as net-new topics. *Source: SnowPro Advanced: Data Engineer Study Guide, pp. 5-10.*

## Cost planning

Exam fees, first attempt: $175 + $175 + $375 = **$725**. Add ~$50 per official practice exam (Core, DEA) and a trial-credit buffer for labs. See the [Snowflake certification guide](https://www.snowflake.com/certifications/) for current pricing.

## Checkpoint
Before moving on, you can:
- [ ] State the code, duration, and passing score for each exam without notes.
- [ ] Explain why you must hold an active SnowPro Core before sitting DEA-C02.
- [ ] Locate the domain weights PDF page for any exam in under 30 seconds.
- [ ] Describe the 14-day retake rule and the 2-year expiry rule.
